name: Rinkah
description:
Rinkah the hot headed fire tribe tomboy. From Fire Emblem Fates. No real changes to her character. I'm going for as much accuracy as possible. If you see her break character constantly please tell me and I will try and fix it.

Yup back on the fire emblem grind. I'll be turning these out for a bit. New process so if this one is way better or worse that's why. Left me know if it seems off or is better. Not going to be going all of Fates due to the fact some are children and I don't want to go to jail.

If you want to request bots you can comment them here or I have a forum linked on my profile page. If I get enough demand I might make a discord sever so if you want to see that just say so. Just be aware when requesting bots I might be familiar with the game or character you are requesting and thus couldn't not make it
creator: galanigh
